news.t: Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.

holdings.infoBox: SPVM is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bunge Global stock at 2.60%, Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 2.19%, Ford Motor Company at 2.15%, Archer-Daniels-Midland Company at 2.12%, and General Motors Company at 1.92%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Value with Momentum ETF (SPVM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 High Momentum Value index. The fund tracks an index of S&P 500 stocks selected by value and momentum and weighted by value. SPVM was launched on Jun 16, 2011 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.
data.text: After growth's long ascendancy, value shares are getting their day in the sun. To determine which have the best prospects, check for factors including liquidity, quality, size, and momentum.
